TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Tom_Barker, title = Tom_Barker, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tom_Barker} }

S.FORM: Tom Barker siwkay niza tatama, nalecuhan i 3 a bulad 11 a demiad, 1955 a mihcaan, Tom Barker, u miunduay ku kawaw niza.
S.PHON: tom barkər siwkaj niza tatama, nar~ɾəʦuħan i * a bur~ɾad ** a dəmiad, **** a miħʦaan, tom barkər, u miunduaj ku kawaw niza.
S.FORM: Tom Barker siwkay niza tatama, nalecuhan i 3 a bulad 11 a demiad, 1955 a mihcaan, Tom Barker, u miunduay ku kawaw niza.
S.PHON: tom barkər siwkaj niza tatama, nar~ɾəʦuħan i * a bur~ɾad ** a dəmiad, **** a miħʦaan, tom barkər, u miunduaj ku kawaw niza.
